content.text:
[Fri 2026-05-29 01:26 GMT+8] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/2). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]

{
  "function": "album",
  "action": "view",
  "params": {
    "sender_id": "6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204",
    "position": 1
  },
  "instructions": [
    "1. 连接 SQLite 数据库 ~/.openclaw/workspace-son/album/album.db",
    "2. 执行查询: SELECT id, annotation, tags, filename, timestamp FROM photos WHERE sender_id='6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0",
    "3. 如果无数据 → 返回: ⚠️ 相册为空，还没有第 1 张照片",
    "4. 如果有数据 → 返回格式（图片路径对应 ~/.openclaw/workspace-son/album/images/{filename}）：",
    "先在文本前加上 MEDIA:album/images/{filename} 指令",
    "然后文本内容：",
    "🖼️ 第 1 张照片",
    "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
    "ID: {id}",
    "注释: \"{annotation}\"",
    "标签: #{tags}",
    "时间: {timestamp}",
    "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━",
    "上下翻看: /看照片 2"
  ]
}

Begin. Execute the assigned task to completion.

content.name: exec

arguments.command: sqlite3 ~/.openclaw/workspace-son/album/album.db "SELECT id, annotation, tags, filename, timestamp FROM photos WHERE sender_id='6687D4D2D1F8EDA5231C6809B1A26204' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0"

arguments.content:
